fix: exclude backup paths from active-source diagnostics
rollback: restore previous diagnostic helper if scope patch is incorrect
symptoms: diagnostic fails due to archived backup copy rather than active code
runtime archive contains historical failure signature
verification: inspect failing path and confirm it is under runtime/diagnostic-backups or archive

fix: recreate the patch file with quoted external heredoc
validate syntax before execution
rollback: reset unstaged broken edits if needed
symptoms: unexpected characters appear after command
script contains merged or duplicated fragments
diagnostic output shows broken shell or Python syntax

run bash -n on generated shell files

fix: replace plain text search with executable command pattern search
exclude grep rule implementation from evidence
symptoms: no-recursion diagnostic reports failure because it matches its own grep rule
diagnostic contract contains target text only inside its self-check
verification: confirm there is no real command invocation of diagnostic-status-registry

fix: move registry count logic into checked helper file
rerun diagnostic contract and registry coverage
symptoms: diagnostic contract prints only first PASS line then stops
python3 -c command substitution exits or blocks before contract values are emitted
verification: inspect whether registry count uses python3 -c

fix: make diagnostic contract self-contained
use schema-aware helper count instead of calling another diagnostic
symptoms: diagnostic contract calls another diagnostic internally
contract stops after helper line when nested diagnostic call exits non-zero or blocks
set -e propagates internal diagnostic failure

fix: scan for heredoc operator plus marker or standalone closing marker
exclude the grep rule line from its own result
symptoms: diagnostic contract reports failure because it matches its own detection string
grep against $0 finds marker text inside the check itself
verification: inspect diagnostic source line containing the check
confirm no real runtime heredoc block exists
search for actual heredoc syntax instead of plain marker mention

fix: refresh registry
rerun coverage
rerun governance

confirm execution stops after first emitted signal

fix: git add diagnostic files after validation
